key.name: toggle-top-keybinding
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for showing, focusing, or hiding the top Warp visor.

key.name: toggle-bottom-keybinding
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for showing, focusing, or hiding the bottom Warp visor.

key.name: reset-geometry-keybinding
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for clearing saved top and bottom geometry and restoring defaults.

key.name: warp-app-id
key.description: The desktop application id used to find and launch Warp.

key.name: default-height-percent
key.description: The default height for top and bottom visor placements.

key.name: current-placement
key.description: The last placement managed by the extension.

key.name: top-geometry
key.description: JSON encoded frame rectangle for the top visor.

key.name: bottom-geometry
key.description: JSON encoded frame rectangle for the bottom visor.

key.name: always-on-top
key.description: Whether to mark the Warp visor as always above normal windows.

key.name: all-workspaces
key.description: Whether to stick the Warp visor to all workspaces.

key.name: skip-taskbar
key.description: When enabled, the Warp visor will not appear in overview mode or when using Alt+Tab.
